name: Email Marketing Bible
description_en: A data-backed email-marketing skill—plan and run automation flows, drive an ESP from an agent, diagnose deliverability, write and refine copy, and pull benchmarks.
description_zh: 以数据为依据的邮件营销技能——规划与运行自动化流程、从智能体驱动 ESP、诊断送达率、撰写与打磨文案,并调取基准数据。
long_en: Covers AI email automation, flows, deliverability, copy, design, and platform selection, grounded in published benchmarks rather than guesswork.
long_zh: 覆盖 AI 邮件自动化、流程、送达率、文案、设计与平台选择,以公开基准而非拍脑袋为依据。
sec_note_en: Can connect to your email service provider to send mail; use permission-based lists and review sends.
sec_note_zh: 可连接你的邮件服务商发送邮件;请使用经许可的名单并审阅发送内容。
